endpoints.name: Geocode an address
endpoints.description: Represents the set of geocoded and standardized sites and intersections whose address best matches a given query address.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Find intersections near to a geographic point
endpoints.description: Represents intersections near a given point
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Find nearest intersection to a geographic point
endpoints.description: Represents the closest intersection to a given point
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Find intersections in a geographic area
endpoints.description: Represents all intersections within a given area
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Get an intersection by its unique ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{INTERSECTIONID}} with a real intersectionid. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Geocode an address and identify site occupants
endpoints.description: Represents the set of occupants whose addresses best match a given query address. Every occupant has an associated site which has a standardized address and a coordinate location on the Earth.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Find occupants of sites near to a geographic point
endpoints.description: Represents occupants near a given point in order of closest to farthest
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Find occupants of the site nearest to a geographic point
endpoints.description: Represents the closest occupant to a given point
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Find occupants of sites in a geographic area
endpoints.description: Represents all occupants within a given area
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Get an occupant (of a site) by its unique ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OCCUPANTID}} with a real occupantid. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Get a comma-separated string of all pids for a given site
endpoints.description: Represents all parcel identifiers associated with an individual site
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat. Replace {{SITEID}} with a real siteid.

endpoints.name: Find sites near to a geographic point
endpoints.description: Represents sites near a given point in the order of closest to farthest
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Find the site nearest to a geographic point
endpoints.description: Represents the site nearest a given point
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Find sites in a geographic area
endpoints.description: Represents sites within a given area
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Get a site by its unique ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat. Replace {{SITEID}} with a real siteid.

endpoints.name: Represents all subsites of a given site
endpoints.description: Represents all subsites of a given site
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat. Replace {{SITEID}} with a real siteid.
